metadata.title: BimDossier
metadata.defaultTitle: BimDossier — Quality Assurance in Construction Act (Wkb)-compliant digital dossier
metadata.description: Quality Assurance in Construction Act (Wkb)-compliant digital dossier for Dutch contractors. Track deadlines, manage documents, resolve findings, and file on time.

hero.headline: Never miss a Quality Assurance in Construction Act (Wkb) deadline again.
hero.subtitle: BimDossier is the digital dossier platform for Dutch contractors. Track bouwmelding and gereedmelding deadlines, manage your documents, resolve findings, and file your dossier bevoegd gezag on time.

features.headline: Everything a contractor needs for Quality Assurance in Construction Act (Wkb) compliance
features.subtitle: From project kickoff to gereedmelding — one platform for your entire Quality Assurance in Construction Act (Wkb) dossier.

deadlines.title: Deadline tracking
deadlines.body: Automatic computation of bouwmelding, informatieplicht, and gereedmelding deadlines. Email reminders at T-30, T-14, T-7, and T-1 days so you never miss a filing.

detail.tagline: Never miss a Wkb filing again
detail.intro: BimDossier computes every statutory deadline for you and reminds your team before each one — so the bouwmelding, informatieplicht, and gereedmelding always go out on time.
detail.problem: The Wkb ties construction to hard statutory dates: the bouwmelding four weeks before you start, informatieplicht moments during the build, and the gereedmelding two weeks before handover. Tracking them by hand across projects means one missed filing can halt work or delay occupancy.
solution: Every deadline is derived from your project's start and handover dates the moment you create it — no manual date math.
Email reminders fire at T-30, T-14, T-7, and T-1 days, so the whole team sees what's due next.
A single calendar view shows every filing across all your projects at a glance.

dossier.title: Dossier completeness
dossier.body: Template-based checklist per building type showing exactly which documents are still needed for your gereedmelding. Progress bar updates as you upload.

detail.tagline: Know exactly what your dossier still needs
detail.intro: A live checklist per building type shows which documents are missing for your gereedmelding, with a progress bar that climbs as you upload.
detail.problemTitle: A dossier is only as good as what's missing
detail.problem: The gereedmelding dossier must be complete before handover, but requirements vary by building type and it's easy to discover a gap only at the deadline — when there's no time left to fix it.
detail.solutionTitle: A template-driven checklist that tracks itself
solution: Each building type loads a checklist of exactly the documents the bevoegd gezag expects.
Upload a document and the matching item ticks off automatically — the progress bar reflects real completeness.
Outstanding items stay visible, so nothing surfaces as a surprise at filing time.

findings.title: Finding management
findings.body: Log inspection findings from your kwaliteitsborger, assign resolution, and upload evidence photos. Track every finding from open to verified.

detail.tagline: Every inspection finding, from open to verified
detail.intro: Log what your kwaliteitsborger finds, assign who fixes it, attach the evidence, and follow each finding all the way to verified.
detail.problemTitle: Findings get lost between site and dossier
detail.problem: Kwaliteitsborgers raise findings during inspections, but when those live in email threads and spreadsheets, resolution stalls and there's no defensible record that each issue was actually closed.
detail.solutionTitle: A single, auditable lifecycle for every finding
solution: Each finding carries its location, severity, assignee, and evidence photos in one place.
Status moves through a clear flow — open, in progress, resolved, verified — that everyone can see.
A full audit trail records who changed what and when, ready for the bevoegd gezag.

images.caption: Status flow from open to verified

certificates.title: Certificate library
certificates.body: Upload typed certificates — CE/DoP declarations, test reports, warranties — with expiry tracking. Get automatic warnings before certificates expire.

detail.intro: Upload typed certificates — CE/DoP declarations, test reports, warranties — with expiry tracking and automatic warnings before they lapse.
detail.problem: Certificates arrive from many suppliers in many formats, each with its own expiry. Tracking them by hand means an out-of-date declaration can quietly weaken your compliance package.
detail.solutionTitle: A typed library that watches expiry for you
solution: Upload each certificate against its type — CE/DoP, test report, warranty, and more.
Expiry dates are tracked centrally so the whole library stays current.
Automatic warnings give you time to renew before anything lapses.

viewer.title: 3D + 2D model viewer
viewer.body: View federated IFC models in the browser — no desktop software. Cut sections, measure, switch storeys and floor plans, and click any element for its properties.

detail.tagline: Your IFC models, right in the browser
detail.intro: View federated IFC models with no desktop software. Cut sections, measure, switch storeys and floor plans, and click any element for its properties.
detail.problemTitle: Heavy desktop tools shouldn't gate a quick look
detail.problem: Checking a model usually means a licensed desktop application and a powerful machine. That puts the model out of reach for site teams, clients, and anyone who just needs a quick look.
detail.solutionTitle: A full viewer that runs anywhere
solution: Open federated IFC models in any modern browser — nothing to install.
Cut section planes, measure distances, and switch between storeys and 2D floor plans.
Click any element to read its properties and jump to linked findings.

reports.title: Compliance reports
reports.body: Generate audit-ready PDF reports: borgingsplan, verklaring kwaliteitsborger, and the complete dossier bevoegd gezag package.

detail.intro: Generate the borgingsplan, the verklaring kwaliteitsborger, and the complete dossier bevoegd gezag package as polished PDFs.
detail.problemTitle: Assembling reports by hand burns days
detail.problem: The Wkb deliverables — borgingsplan, verklaring kwaliteitsborger, and the full dossier — are tedious to assemble by hand, and a manual document drifts out of sync with the project the moment something changes.
detail.solutionTitle: Reports generated from live project data
solution: Produce each required document straight from your current project data.
Reports are formatted to a consistent, audit-ready PDF template.
Regenerate at any time so the package always reflects the latest state.

snagging.title: Snag on drawings & in 3D
snagging.body: Pin findings directly onto your PDF floor plans or 3D model. Every snag carries its location, photos, and Bbl reference.

detail.tagline: Pin findings exactly where they belong
detail.intro: Drop a snag straight onto your PDF floor plan or 3D model. Every pin carries its location, photos, and Bbl reference.
detail.problemTitle: "Somewhere on the second floor" isn't good enough
detail.problem: A finding described in words is hard to locate again on site. Without a precise position, the wrong element gets fixed, or the issue is re-inspected from scratch.
detail.solutionTitle: Location-anchored findings on plan and model
solution: Click the exact spot on a PDF floor plan or in the federated 3D model to place a pin.
The pin stores its coordinates, so anyone can jump back to the precise location later.
Each snag links its photos and the relevant Bbl article alongside the position.

images.caption: Pin placed on a PDF floor plan
Snag with photos and Bbl reference

board.title: Findings board & calendar
board.body: Track every finding on a Kanban board, a deadline calendar, and overview dashboards — filter by assignee, status, or severity.

detail.tagline: See your findings the way you work
detail.intro: Track every finding on a Kanban board, a deadline calendar, and overview dashboards — filtered by assignee, status, or severity.
detail.problemTitle: A flat list hides what matters now
detail.problem: When findings pile up in one long list, it's hard to see what's overdue, who's overloaded, or which severities need attention first.
detail.solutionTitle: Multiple views over the same findings
solution: A Kanban board groups findings by status so progress is visible at a glance.
A calendar surfaces due dates so nothing slips past its deadline.
Dashboards and filters slice by assignee, status, or severity in one click.

photos.title: Photo evidence & annotation
photos.body: Capture photos on site, mark them up with arrows and notes, and attach them to findings as proof of resolution.

detail.tagline: Proof of resolution, marked up on the spot
detail.intro: Capture photos on site, annotate them with arrows and notes, and attach them to findings as evidence.
detail.problemTitle: A photo without context proves little
detail.problem: Site photos scattered across phones and chat apps lose their meaning — no one remembers which finding they belong to or what they were meant to show.
detail.solutionTitle: Annotated photos tied to the finding
solution: Shoot photos directly against a finding so they're always in context.
Mark up arrows and notes to point out exactly what changed.
Before-and-after evidence stays attached as the proof of resolution.

mobile.title: Mobile inspections, even offline
mobile.body: A native app for on-site snagging. Place findings, shoot photos, and keep working with no signal — it syncs when you're back online.

detail.tagline: Inspect on site, signal or not
detail.intro: A native app for on-site snagging: place findings, shoot photos, and keep working with no connection — it syncs when you're back online.
detail.problemTitle: Construction sites don't have reliable signal
detail.problem: Inspections happen in basements, shells, and remote sites where mobile coverage drops. An app that needs a connection leaves inspectors writing notes on paper to re-enter later.
solution: Place findings and capture photos with no connection — everything is stored locally.
Work continues uninterrupted as you move through the building.
The moment you're back online, your work syncs to the project automatically.

bcf.title: Open BCF interoperability
bcf.body: Import and export findings as BCF to round-trip issues with Solibri, BIMcollab, Revit, and your kwaliteitsborger's tools.

detail.tagline: Round-trip findings with any BIM tool
detail.intro: Import and export findings as BCF to exchange issues with Solibri, BIMcollab, Revit, and your kwaliteitsborger's tools.
detail.problemTitle: Findings get trapped in one tool
detail.problem: Every party works in different software, and re-typing findings between tools is slow and error-prone. Without a shared format, issues drift out of sync across the team.
solution: Export findings as standard BCF to share with any compatible tool.
Import BCF from your kwaliteitsborger so external issues land in your project.
Round-trip changes keep everyone working from the same set of issues.

collaboration.title: Team roles & audit trail
collaboration.body: Invite your team with the right permissions (owner, editor, viewer, inspector). Every change is logged for an audit-ready history.

detail.tagline: The right access, with a full audit trail
detail.intro: Invite your team with precise permissions — owner, editor, viewer, inspector — and log every change for an audit-ready history.
detail.problemTitle: Open access and no record is a liability
detail.problem: Without role-based access, anyone can change anything; without a log, you can't show who did what. Both are a problem when a dossier has to stand up to scrutiny.
detail.solutionTitle: Role-based access plus a complete log
solution: Assign each member a role — owner, editor, viewer, or inspector — that fits their job.
Permissions gate what each person can see and change across the project.
Every change is recorded in an audit trail you can hand to the bevoegd gezag.

featureDetail.imagesNote: More screenshots and short videos coming soon.

roadmap.headline: What we're building next
roadmap.subtitle: Already in design or in progress — not available yet.

comments.title: Finding discussions
comments.body: Comment threads on each finding so your team and kwaliteitsborger can resolve issues in context.

handover.title: Consumentendossier & oplevering
handover.body: Client handover sign-off and proces-verbaal, separate from the dossier bevoegd gezag.

ai.title: AI dossier assistant
ai.body: Ask questions across your documents and drawings. Self-hosted and privacy-first — your data never leaves our EU infrastructure.

push.title: Mobile push reminders
push.body: Deadline and finding alerts pushed straight to your phone.

howItWorks.headline: From project start to gereedmelding in four steps

step1.title: Create your project
step1.body: Enter the address with Dutch autocomplete, select building type and gevolgklasse, set planned dates. Deadlines are computed automatically.

step2.title: Upload documents
step2.body: Drawings, certificates, KB documents — upload everything in one place. The dossier checklist shows what is still missing.

step3.title: Track findings
step3.body: Log inspection findings, assign resolution to your team, upload evidence photos. Full lifecycle from open to verified.

step4.title: File on time
step4.body: Email reminders before every deadline. Download the complete dossier package for gereedmelding filing at the Omgevingsloket.

cta.headline: Stop chasing documents. Start filing on time.
cta.subtitle: Join the early access program. Get your Quality Assurance in Construction Act (Wkb) dossier under control before your next deadline.

blog.subtitle: Quality Assurance in Construction Act (Wkb) compliance, Dutch building regulations, and product updates.

contactPage.subtitle: We'll walk you through BimDossier, answer your questions, and help you choose the plan that fits your projects.
contactPage.bookCallDescription: Schedule a 30-minute demo with our team. We'll show you the platform and discuss pricing tailored to your situation.
contactPage.emailDescription: Prefer email? Reach out and we'll get back to you within one business day.

intro.subtitle: We're opening a limited pilot to a small group of Dutch contractors. Tell us about your team — if it's a fit, we'll be in touch.

errors.alreadyApproved: Your BimDossier account is already set up. Check your email for the activation link, or contact support if you didn't receive one.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests from your network — please try again in an hour.
errors.unreachable: We couldn't reach the BimDossier API. Please try again in a moment.

snagShowcase.subtitle: Drag to rotate the model. Click a pin to see the snag it flags.
